app.title: ZunaroDo
settings.title: Socruithe
cap.calendar.delete_event.desc: Bogann coinne go dti an bruscar. Aischuir tri calendar.restore_event; go buan ach tri calendar.purge_event.
cap.calendar.export_ical.desc: Easportalann gach coinne mar chomhad iCalendar (.ics) is feidir a iomportail isteach in aon fheilire coitianta.
cap.calendar.import_ical.desc: Leann comhad iCalendar (.ics) agus cruthaionn na coinni ann. NI athraitear coinni ata ann cheana - cruthaitear iontralacha nua.
cap.calendar.upcoming.desc: Tugann na coinni ata le teacht laistigh de leargas ar ais.
cap.contracts.delete.desc: Bogann conradh go dti an bruscar (scriosadh bog). Inaischurtha le „contracts.restore”; go buan le „contracts.purge”.
cap.contracts.generate_cancellation.desc: Cruthaionn litir chealaithe in am do chonradh - mar PDF inphriontala agus/no dreacht riomhphoist.
cap.contracts.list.desc: Liostaionn gach conradh gniomhach lena gcostais. Is feidir scagadh de roghnach de reir catagoire.
cap.contracts.list_deleted.desc: Liostaionn na conarthai ata sa bhruscar.
cap.contracts.purge.desc: Scriosadh buan conartha (ni feidir aischur a thuilleadh).
cap.contracts.report_price_change.desc: Taifeadann athru praghais do chonradh agus saburaann e i stair na bpraghsanna.
cap.contracts.set_owner.desc: Sannann conradh do dhuine (no cealaionn an sannadh le owner_id=0).
cap.contracts.upcoming_deadlines.desc: Tugann na sprioclai cealaithe ata le teacht ar ais, teoranta de roghnach do na chead N la eile.
cap.day.log_energy.desc: Measann an la inniu (1=traochta ... 5=ar fheabhas) agus cruthaionn iontrail no cuireann ceann an lae inniu ina hait.
cap.day.recent_entries.desc: Liostaionn na hiontralacha laethula is deanai.
cap.day.recommendation.desc: Tugann moladh simpli bunaithe ar na hiontralacha is deanai.
cap.family.add_member.desc: Cuireann ball teaghlaigh leis, le breithla de roghnach (teann an data go huathoibrioch isteach sa mhodul feilire).
cap.family.add_order.desc: Cruthaionn tasc aon-uaire sannta do dhuine ar leith (le sprioc).
cap.family.add_task.desc: Cruthaionn tasc ti athfhillteach le rothlu idir na baill.
cap.family.bulk_complete_overdue.desc: Ticeann gach tasc ata dlite inniu no roimhe sin. Bogann an rothlu duine amhain ar aghaidh do gach tasc.
cap.family.complete_task.desc: Ticeann tasc: bogann an rothlu go dti an chead duine eile agus sceidealtar an tasc aris.
cap.family.delete_member.desc: Bogann ball teaghlaigh go dti an bruscar (scriosadh bog). Aischur tri family.restore_member, go buan tri family.purge_member.
cap.family.members.desc: Liostaionn baill an teaghlaigh. Is feidir le moduil eile e a usaid freisin chun iontralacha a shannadh do dhuine.
cap.family.orders.desc: Liostaionn na taisc aon-uaire leis an duine freagrach agus an stadas, eagraithe de reir tosaiochta. Is feidir scagadh de roghnach de reir catagoire.
cap.family.purge_member.desc: Scriosann ball go buan. Dichuplaitear tagairti tri ON DELETE SET NULL.
cap.family.shopping_add.desc: Cuireann iontrail leis an liosta siopadoireachta comhroinnte.
cap.family.shopping_mark.desc: Ticeann iontrail ar an liosta siopadoireachta (no athshocraionn i).
cap.family.tasks.desc: Liostaionn na taisc ti leis an duine freagrach reatha agus an chead sprioc eile.
cap.finance.delete_expense.desc: Bogann costas go dti an bruscar. Aischur tri „finance.restore_expense”; go buan tri „finance.purge_expense”.
cap.finance.expenses_by_category.desc: Comhiomlanaionn na costais de reir catagoire.
cap.finance.expenses_by_person.desc: Comhiomlanaionn na costais de reir ball teaghlaigh (reitionn owner_id tri family.members).
cap.finance.list_expenses.desc: Liostaionn gach costas taifeadta le hiomlan.
cap.finance.monthly_overview.desc: Riomhann an t-ualach miosuil: costais aon-uaire na miosa seo in eineacht le costais athfhillteacha na gconarthai on modul A.
cap.finance.price_memory.desc: Liostaionn na praghsanna stoirailte de tairgi athfhillteacha.
cap.finance.remember_price.desc: Cuimhnionn ar phraghas reatha tairge (cuimhne praghsanna do cheannach athfhillteach).
cap.finance.scan_receipt.desc: Leann admhail tri OCR agus baineann na mireanna agus an t-iomlan as (teastaionn pytesseract + Tesseract; gan suitealail taispeantar teachtaireacht shoileir).
cap.inbox.accept_proposal.desc: Glacann le moladh: glaonn ar an gcumas sprice, taifeadann an modul freagrach na sonrai.
cap.inbox.analyze_mail.desc: Anailisionn teacs riomhphoist isteach agus cruthaionn molta oiriunacha sa bhosca.
cap.inbox.bulk_delete_archived.desc: Scriosann go buan on mbosca gach moladh ata glactha no diultaithe cheana.
cap.inbox.bulk_reject_open.desc: Diultaionn do gach moladh oscailte ag an am ceanna. Tugann lion na molta diultaithe ar ais.
cap.inbox.fetch_imap.desc: Faigheann riomhphoist gan leamh tri IMAP agus anailisionn iad. Teastaionn ALLTAGSHELFER_IMAP_HOST/USER/PASS sa timpeallacht; gan iad scipeáiltear e.
cap.inbox.proposals.desc: Liostaionn na molta oscailte sa bhosca.
cap.inbox.update_proposal.desc: Cuireann moladh oscailte in eagar sula nglactar leis. Ni bhaineann ach le molta sa stadas „oscailte”.
cap.notes.add.desc: Cruthaionn nota nua. Pionailte de roghnach le haonan (entity_type, entity_id).
cap.notes.add_attachment.desc: Pionann nota freisin le haonan eile (n:m). Fanann an nasc priomhuil tri notes.attach gan athru.
cap.notes.attach.desc: Pionann nota le haonan (no scaoileann e le entity_type=null).
cap.notes.cleanup_for_entity.desc: Scriosann gach nota pionailte leis an aonan sonraithe. Glaoitear air go hinmheanach ag cumais scriosta moduil eile.
cap.notes.get.desc: Tugann nota ar leith ar ais.
cap.notes.list.desc: Liostaionn notai. Scagtha de roghnach de reir aonain.
cap.social.contacts.desc: Liostaionn gach teagmhail leis na laethanta ata fagtha go dti an chead teagmhail eile. Is feidir scagadh de roghnach de reir caidrimh (catagoire).
cap.social.delete_contact.desc: Bogann teagmhail go dti an bruscar. Aischur tri social.restore_contact; go buan tri social.purge_contact.
cap.social.draft_message.desc: Molann teachtaireacht ghearr do theagmhail (teimplead as line; sa mhod API gineann an LLM ceann nios pearsanta).
cap.social.export_vcard.desc: Easportalann gach teagmhail mar chomhad vCard (.vcf), is feidir a iomportail isteach in aon leabhar seoltai coitianta.
cap.social.import_vcard.desc: Leann comhad vCard (.vcf) agus cruthaionn na teagmhalacha ann. Fanann teagmhalacha ata ann cheana gan athru - cruthaitear iontralacha nua.
cap.social.mark_contacted.desc: Marcalann teagmhail mar cheann a ndearnadh teagmhail leis anois direach (socraionn last_contacted = inniu).
cap.stats.contracts_overview.desc: Tugann forleargas ar lion na gconarthai gniomhach, an t-iomlan miosuil agus na 3 mhir is daoire.
cap.stats.expenses_per_category.desc: Comhiomlanaionn na costais de reir catagoire (reamhshocru: an bhliain reatha).
cap.stats.expenses_per_month.desc: Suimionn na costais de reir mi do na N mi dheireanacha (reamhshocru 12) lena n-airitear an mhi reatha.
cap.stats.export_yearly_pdf.desc: Gineann tuarascail bhliantuil PDF inphriontala le hiomlan na gcostas, na priomhchatagoiri agus forleargas ar na conarthai.
cap.stats.yearly_summary.desc: Forleargas iomlan do bhliain: suim na gcostas go leir, priomhchatagoiri, mean miosuil.
cap.system.agenda.desc: Grupalann sprioclai na modul go leir ata le teacht de reir lae feilire. Reamhshocru: na chead 7 la eile (forleargas seachtaine). Cuirtear iontralacha ata thar teorainn ar ais ar leithligh.
cap.system.search.desc: Cuardaionn trasna i gconarthai, costais, coinni, baill teaghlaigh, teagmhalacha agus molta. Is eochairfhocal an t-ionchur; cuirtear na torthai ar ais i bhfoirm aontaithe. Is feidir scagadh de roghnach de reir trethimsir, stadais agus catagoire.
